message: 🆘 एम्स दिल्ली में एक भयंकर एक्सीडेंट हुआ है। 3 यूनिट O+ ब्लड अर्जेंट चाहिए। मरीज की हालत गंभीर है। कॉल करें 9812345678
message_english: 🆘 A terrible accident has happened at AIIMS Delhi. 3 units of O+ blood needed urgently. The patient's condition is serious. Call 9812345678

message: सफदरजंग हॉस्पिटल के ICU में AB- ब्लड की 2 यूनिट तुरंत चाहिए। बहुत क्रिटिकल सिचुएशन है। कोई भी डोनर आ सकता है?
message_english: 2 units of AB- blood needed immediately in Safdarjung Hospital's ICU. Very critical situation. Can any donor come?

message: अपोलो चेन्नई में भारी ब्लीडिंग के कारण 4 यूनिट B- खून की अत्यंत आवश्यकता है। कृपया तुरंत 9988776655 पर संपर्क करें।
message_english: 4 units of B- blood are urgently needed due to heavy bleeding at Apollo Chennai. Please contact 9988776655 immediately.

message: KEM मुंबई में डिलीवरी के दौरान क्रिटिकल कंडीशन है। 2 यूनिट A+ ब्लड की बहुत जरूरत है। प्लीज हेल्प करें।
message_english: Critical condition during delivery at KEM Mumbai. 2 units of A+ blood are badly needed. Please help.

message: मेदांता गुड़गांव में ऑर्गन फेल्योर का केस है। 5 यूनिट O- खून 1 घंटे में चाहिए। डोनर जल्द पहुंचे 8888000011।
message_english: Organ failure case at Medanta Gurgaon. 5 units of O- blood needed in 1 hour. Donor please reach soon 8888000011.

message: CMC वेल्लोर में न्यूबोर्न बेबी को तुरंत 1 यूनिट B+ खून चाहिए। टाइम नहीं है, जो पास हो जल्दी आएं।
message_english: 1 unit of B+ blood needed immediately for a newborn baby at CMC Vellore. There is no time, whoever is nearby please come fast.

message: मैक्स साकेत दिल्ली में इंटरनल ब्लीडिंग हो रही है। कल सुबह तक 2 यूनिट A- ब्लड अरेंज करना है।
message_english: Internal bleeding is happening at Max Saket Delhi. Have to arrange 2 units of A- blood by tomorrow morning.

message: नारायणा बैंगलोर में डेंगू से प्लेटलेट्स 12 हज़ार रह गए हैं। 3 यूनिट O+ ब्लड चाहिए आज ही। कॉल 9123456780
message_english: Platelets have dropped to 12 thousand due to dengue at Narayana Bangalore. 3 units of O+ blood needed today itself. Call 9123456780

message: फोर्टिस गुड़गांव में अपेंडिक्स फट गया है, 1 यूनिट B+ ब्लड चाहिए कल की सर्जरी के लिए।
message_english: Appendix burst at Fortis Gurgaon, 1 unit of B+ blood needed for tomorrow's surgery.

message: पीजीआईएमईआर चंडीगढ़ में सीवियर एनीमिया के कारण 2 यूनिट AB+ ब्लड की सख्त जरूरत है। नंबर 7000070000
message_english: Due to severe anemia at PGIMER Chandigarh, 2 units of AB+ blood are strictly needed. Number 7000070000

message: सर गंगा राम दिल्ली में सर्जरी में कॉम्प्लिकेशन आ गया है। 3 यूनिट A+ ब्लड जल्द से जल्द चाहिए।
message_english: There is a complication in surgery at Sir Ganga Ram Delhi. 3 units of A+ blood needed as soon as possible.

message: लीलावती मुंबई में लिवर डैमेज के मरीज को 2 यूनिट O- खून चाहिए। डोनर प्लीज 9090909090 पर बात करें।
message_english: 2 units of O- blood needed for a liver damage patient at Lilavati Mumbai. Donor please talk on 9090909090.

message: KIMS हैदराबाद में अगले हफ्ते सिजेरियन ऑपरेशन है। 1 यूनिट B- ब्लड की व्यवस्था करनी है।
message_english: Cesarean operation is scheduled for next week at KIMS Hyderabad. Need to arrange 1 unit of B- blood.

message: एम्स दिल्ली में बोन मैरो ट्रांसप्लांट के लिए 2 यूनिट A+ ब्लड चाहिए। गुरुवार तक इंतजाम करना है। 9898989898
message_english: 2 units of A+ blood needed for bone marrow transplant at AIIMS Delhi. Have to arrange it by Thursday. 9898989898

message: अपोलो चेन्नई में बाईपास सर्जरी शेड्यूल है। 3 यूनिट O+ ब्लड की आवश्यकता होगी इस शुक्रवार।
message_english: Bypass surgery is scheduled at Apollo Chennai. 3 units of O+ blood will be needed this Friday.

message: सफदरजंग दिल्ली में डायलिसिस के दौरान 1 यूनिट AB- ब्लड बैंक में जमा करना है। कोई डोनर हो तो बताएं।
message_english: Need to deposit 1 unit of AB- in the blood bank during dialysis at Safdarjung Delhi. Let me know if there's any donor.

message: इस रविवार को दिल्ली के कनॉट प्लेस में एक विशाल रक्तदान शिविर है। कृपया आएं और जीवन बचाएं।
message_english: There is a huge blood donation camp at Connaught Place, Delhi this Sunday. Please come and save lives.

message: मेरी बहन के लिए मुंबई में रक्तदान करने वाले सभी लोगों का बहुत-बहुत धन्यवाद। वह अब ठीक है।
message_english: Thank you so much to everyone who donated blood for my sister in Mumbai. She is fine now.

message: क्या कोई बता सकता है कि एंटीबायोटिक खाने के कितने दिन बाद रक्तदान कर सकते हैं?
message_english: Can anyone tell how many days after taking antibiotics one can donate blood?

message: चंडीगढ़ में रक्तदान के लिए जागरूकता अभियान चल रहा है। ज्यादा से ज्यादा लोग जुड़ें।
message_english: An awareness campaign for blood donation is going on in Chandigarh. Maximum people should join.

message: Bhai log Fortis Gurgaon me B+ ki bohot urgent jarurat hai. Accident case in ICU, 3 units chahiye jaldi! Pls aao 9811122233
message_english: Brothers, there is a very urgent need for B+ at Fortis Gurgaon. Accident case in ICU, 3 units needed fast! Pls come 9811122233

message: Medanta me A- blood chahiye URGENTLY. Internal bleeding nahi ruk rahi, 2 unit arrange karni hai next 1 hour me.
message_english: A- blood needed URGENTLY at Medanta. Internal bleeding is not stopping, 2 units have to be arranged in the next 1 hour.

message: KEM Mumbai me patient sink kar raha hai. 4 units O- blood ki ekdum immediate need hai. Pura group share kare 🆘
message_english: Patient is sinking at KEM Mumbai. 4 units of O- blood are needed immediately. Whole group please share 🆘

message: Critical baby at CMC Vellore! AB- blood 1 unit urgently chahiye. Doctors bol rhe hain bilkul time nahi hai. Call 9990001112
message_english: Critical baby at CMC Vellore! 1 unit of AB- blood is needed urgently. Doctors are saying there is absolutely no time. Call 9990001112

message: Massive crash on highway, 5 units O+ needed at KIMS Hyderabad emergency ward. Jiske paas bhi O+ hai pls bhago hospital.
message_english: Massive crash on highway, 5 units O+ needed at KIMS Hyderabad emergency ward. Whoever has O+, pls rush to the hospital.

message: Narayana Bangalore me patient ka heart fail ho raha hai. 2 unit A+ blood chahiye abhi ke abhi. Save a life pls.
message_english: Patient's heart is failing at Narayana Bangalore. 2 units of A+ blood needed right now. Save a life pls.

message: Sir Ganga Ram Delhi me urgent operation chal rha hai, 3 unit B- blood ki zarurat aan padi hai! Koi aao pls! 8888877777
message_english: Urgent operation is going on at Sir Ganga Ram Delhi, 3 units of B- blood are suddenly needed! Someone please come! 8888877777

message: Lilavati Mumbai me post delivery heavy hemorrhage. 4 unit AB+ blood ki zaroorat hai in next 30 mins. RT urgently.
message_english: Post-delivery heavy hemorrhage at Lilavati Mumbai. 4 units of AB+ blood are needed in the next 30 mins. RT urgently.

message: Max Saket me poison case aaya hai, condition extreme bad hai. 2 unit O+ chahiye turant blood badalne ke liye.
message_english: A poison case has arrived at Max Saket, condition is extremely bad. 2 units of O+ needed immediately to change the blood.

message: Dengue severe ho gaya hai, AIIMS Delhi me 2 unit B+ chahiye by evening. Drop a text or call at 7777766666
message_english: Dengue has become severe, 2 units of B+ needed at AIIMS Delhi by evening. Drop a text or call at 7777766666

message: Apollo Chennai me chemo chal rha hai, blood count drop ho gaya. 1 unit A+ required hai kal subah. Kisi ko lead pata hai?
message_english: Chemo is going on at Apollo Chennai, blood count has dropped. 1 unit of A+ is required tomorrow morning. Does anyone know a lead?

message: Safdarjung me operation kal subah hona hai, 3 unit O- blood ka prabandh karna hai. Please help out dosto.
message_english: Operation is to happen tomorrow morning at Safdarjung, have to arrange 3 units of O- blood. Please help out friends.

message: Urgent transplant hai PGIMER Chandigarh me aaj shaam ko. 2 unit AB- chahiye donor. Blood bank khali hai. Call 9988998899
message_english: There's an urgent transplant at PGIMER Chandigarh this evening. Need 2 units of AB- donor. Blood bank is empty. Call 9988998899

message: KEM Mumbai me severe weakness aur hb 4 pe aa gaya hai. 1 unit B- chahiye jaldi se. Pls DM me.
message_english: Severe weakness at KEM Mumbai and hb has dropped to 4. 1 unit of B- needed quickly. Pls DM me.

message: Gastric bleeding rukk nahi rahi hai CMC Vellore me. 2 unit O+ blood chahiye raat 8 baje tak. Please check and tell.
message_english: Gastric bleeding is not stopping at CMC Vellore. 2 units of O+ blood needed by 8 PM tonight. Please check and tell.

message: Narayana Bangalore me urgent bypass honi hai tomorrow. 3 unit A- blood chahiye reserve me rakhne ke liye.
message_english: Urgent bypass has to be done tomorrow at Narayana Bangalore. 3 units of A- blood needed to keep in reserve.

message: Sir Ganga Ram hospital Delhi me acute liver failure hua hai. 2 unit B+ required urgently aaj hi. Contact 9123491234
message_english: Acute liver failure has occurred at Sir Ganga Ram hospital Delhi. 2 units of B+ required urgently today itself. Contact 9123491234

message: KIMS Hyderabad me blood count achanak drop ho gaya. 1 unit AB+ chahiye kal dopehar tak for safe side.
message_english: Blood count suddenly dropped at KIMS Hyderabad. 1 unit of AB+ needed by tomorrow afternoon for the safe side.

message: Medanta Gurgaon me spine surgery next week schedule hai. Doctor ne 2 unit O+ blood arrange karne bola hai thursday tak.
message_english: Spine surgery is scheduled next week at Medanta Gurgaon. The doctor has asked to arrange 2 units of O+ blood by Thursday.

message: Lilavati Mumbai me routine transfusion hona hai is friday. 1 unit A+ blood chahiye hoga. Any leads guys?
message_english: Routine transfusion is to happen this Friday at Lilavati Mumbai. 1 unit of A+ blood will be needed. Any leads guys?

message: Planned kidney stone operation hai Fortis Gurgaon me in 4 days. Blood bank me 2 unit B+ jama karna hai. Call 8000080000
message_english: Planned kidney stone operation is at Fortis Gurgaon in 4 days. Have to deposit 2 units of B+ in the blood bank. Call 8000080000

message: Max Saket me 1 unit AB- blood replacement karni hai wednesday tak. Kisi ka free time ho toh please batana.
message_english: Have to do 1 unit of AB- blood replacement at Max Saket by Wednesday. If anyone has free time please tell.

message: Upcoming tumor removal surgery ke liye PGIMER Chandigarh me 2 unit O- blood chahiye aane wale somvaar ke liye.
message_english: 2 units of O- blood are needed for upcoming tumor removal surgery at PGIMER Chandigarh for the coming Monday.

message: Apollo Chennai me scheduled chemo support ke liye 1 unit A- chahiye is weekend. Koi Chennai ka donor help kar do.
message_english: 1 unit of A- is needed for scheduled chemo support at Apollo Chennai this weekend. Some Chennai donor please help out.

message: Delhi walo, is sunday Vasant Kunj me blood camp hai. Refreshment and certificate free milega. Jarur aao donate karne.
message_english: Delhi folks, there is a blood camp in Vasant Kunj this Sunday. Refreshment and certificate will be free. Definitely come to donate.

message: Hyderabad me jin bhi logo ne O+ diya unko bada wala Thank You! Patient ab bilkul theek hain ghar aa gaye.
message_english: A big Thank You to everyone who gave O+ in Hyderabad! The patient is completely fine now and has come home.

message: Tattoo banwane ke kitne months baad blood donate kar sakte hain? Mumbai me donation karna hai kal. Any idea?
message_english: How many months after getting a tattoo can one donate blood? I have to donate in Mumbai tomorrow. Any idea?

message: Bangalore me reliable blood banks ka koi contact info hai kisi ke paas? Ek list banani hai society ke liye.
message_english: Does anyone have contact info for reliable blood banks in Bangalore? Need to make a list for the society.

message: Youth ko aage aana chahiye! Har 3 mahine me ek baar donate zaroor kare. Chennai ke sabhi dosto ko tag karo aur blood donate karo.
message_english: Youth should come forward! Definitely donate once every 3 months. Tag all friends in Chennai and donate blood.

message: Humari company Gurgaon me kal blood drive organise kar rahi hai Red Cross ke sath. Apne friends aur family ko le aao.
message_english: Our company is organizing a blood drive tomorrow in Gurgaon with the Red Cross. Bring your friends and family.
